title: salix × mirifica
intro: Salix × mirifica, also known as the Himalayan willow or Indian willow, is a hybrid willow plant that combines the characteristics of Salix alba and Salix tetrasperma. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Salix × mirifica include reducing fever, alleviating pain and swelling, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular remedy for various health issues such as arthritis and digestive problems. Salix × mirifica is typically prepared into herbal teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
